name: Gold79 Mines Ltd.
summary: Gold79 Mines Ltd., an exploration stage junior mining company, engages in the identification, acquisition, evaluation, and exploration of mineral properties in North America. The company holds interests in three gold projects, including the Jefferson Canyon Gold project and the Tip Top Gold project located in Nevada, the United States; and the Gold Chain project located in Arizona, the United States. It also holds interests in the Greyhound project located in Nunavut, Canada; and the Taviche project located in Oaxaca, Mexico. The company was formerly known as Aura Resources Inc. and changed its name to Gold79 Mines Ltd. in August 2020. Gold79 Mines Ltd. was founded in 2003 and is based in Vancouver, Canada.
